---
title: "Download"
---

## Current release: v0.1

### Complete archives

Download all data files and codebook in a single archive:

- [us_mission_status_v0.1.zip](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/brentonk/us_diplomatic_missions/main/data/v0.1/us_mission_status_v0.1.zip)
- [us_mission_status_v0.1.tar.gz](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/brentonk/us_diplomatic_missions/main/data/v0.1/us_mission_status_v0.1.tar.gz)

### Codebook

- [CODEBOOK_us_mission_status_v0.1.pdf](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/brentonk/us_diplomatic_missions/main/data/v0.1/CODEBOOK_us_mission_status_v0.1.pdf) (PDF)
- [CODEBOOK_us_mission_status_v0.1.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/brentonk/us_diplomatic_missions/main/data/v0.1/CODEBOOK_us_mission_status_v0.1.md) (Markdown)

### Range datasets

One row per country--date range with constant diplomatic status.

- [mission_status_range_cow_v0.1.csv](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/brentonk/us_diplomatic_missions/main/data/v0.1/mission_status_range_cow_v0.1.csv) (Correlates of War)
- [mission_status_range_gw_v0.1.csv](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/brentonk/us_diplomatic_missions/main/data/v0.1/mission_status_range_gw_v0.1.csv) (Gleditsch-Ward)
- [mission_status_range_gwm_v0.1.csv](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/brentonk/us_diplomatic_missions/main/data/v0.1/mission_status_range_gwm_v0.1.csv) (GW + microstates)

### Monthly datasets

One row per country--month with min/max/median/mode aggregation.

- [mission_status_monthly_cow_v0.1.csv](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/brentonk/us_diplomatic_missions/main/data/v0.1/mission_status_monthly_cow_v0.1.csv) (Correlates of War)
- [mission_status_monthly_gw_v0.1.csv](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/brentonk/us_diplomatic_missions/main/data/v0.1/mission_status_monthly_gw_v0.1.csv) (Gleditsch-Ward)
- [mission_status_monthly_gwm_v0.1.csv](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/brentonk/us_diplomatic_missions/main/data/v0.1/mission_status_monthly_gwm_v0.1.csv) (GW + microstates)

### Yearly datasets

One row per country--year with min/max/median/mode aggregation.

- [mission_status_yearly_cow_v0.1.csv](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/brentonk/us_diplomatic_missions/main/data/v0.1/mission_status_yearly_cow_v0.1.csv) (Correlates of War)
- [mission_status_yearly_gw_v0.1.csv](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/brentonk/us_diplomatic_missions/main/data/v0.1/mission_status_yearly_gw_v0.1.csv) (Gleditsch-Ward)
- [mission_status_yearly_gwm_v0.1.csv](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/brentonk/us_diplomatic_missions/main/data/v0.1/mission_status_yearly_gwm_v0.1.csv) (GW + microstates)

## Previous releases

No previous releases.
